package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for handler_and_service_both_log_same_error_chain: Duplicated logging ownership where both service and handler log the same failure.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule068NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule068NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule068NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario068Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule068NegativeService, input Rule068NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
